texto: Vulnerability scares most of us because we've been taught that FEELING our feelings is a sign of "over-sensitivity and weakness". We've taught ourselves to "numb" our feelings because they are too painful.We arrive at vulnerability when we allow ourselves to FEEL rather than think our feelings. It's an inside job of excavating away all the "stuff" that is in the way of reaching our heart, where love and vulnerability live.
explicacao: Citação de Marlene Milner sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Vulnerability scares most of us because we've been taught that FEELING our feelings is a sign of …” articula amor, 12step, recovery em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como recovery e self-love.
